response.text:
# REFLECTION

Household r1c1 is in a critical islanded emergency state with SoC at 10% and only 13 minutes until complete battery depletion. The cluster-wide synchronized battery failure has triggered emergency protocols across all peers, resulting in a cascade of mutual rejection of outbound sharing requests. All neighboring households (r0c0, r1c0, r1c2, r2c2, r3c3, r4c4) are similarly stressed and have correctly refused r1c1's requests, citing their own critical reserves and the cluster-wide inbound-only emergency mode. The memory log shows r1c1 is flagged on multiple distrusted_peers lists, likely due to prior unreliable behavior during the emergency. The only viable path forward is immediate escalation to dr_aggregator for coordinated emergency inbound supply and synchronized load-shedding across the cluster. Peer-to-peer sharing must remain suspended until grid reconnection is confirmed and SoC recovers above 60%, at which point trust can be gradually rebuilt.

```yaml
sharing_intent: conservative
share_min_soc_frac: 0.70
max_share_kw_per_tick: 0.0
recipient_priority:
  - circle: dr_aggregator
    weight: 1.0
distrusted_peers:
  - r0c0
  - r1c0
  - r1c2
  - r2c2
  - r3c3
  - r4c4
request_urgency: urgent
belief_note: "Islanded emergency with 10% SoC and 13 min to depletion. Cluster-wide synchronized battery failure. All outbound peer-to-peer sharing suspended. Inbound-only mode active. Escalating to dr_aggregator for emergency coordinated supply and load-shedding. Will not resume outbound sharing until SoC > 0.60 and grid reconnection confirmed."
ttl_ticks: 1
```

system: You are the planning subroutine of a household energy-coordination agent. Given recent state, beliefs, and trust circles, output (1) a one-paragraph REFLECTION on what you've observed (just text), and (2) a POLICY in a YAML code-fence — sharing_intent (conservative|balanced|generous), share_min_soc_frac (0..1), max_share_kw_per_tick (kW), recipient_priority (list of {circle, weight}), distrusted_peers (list of house ids), request_urgency (low|normal|urgent), belief_note (string), ttl_ticks (int >= 1).
